channel.title: Engineering on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Architect vs The Builder: Redefining Engineering Roles in 2026
item.description: The traditional engineering hierarchy of junior→senior→architect is collapsing. What emerges is a cleaner, harsher split: people who decide what to build, and people who turn that decision into code.

item.title: Spec-Driven Development: When the Brief Becomes the Product
item.description: With AI handling implementation, the specification itself becomes the product. What you're really selling is clarity of thought—and the ability to write briefs that don't lie.
